<div id="main" class="col-md-9" role="main">

# CSHstats

<div class="section level1">

R vignettes/pkgdown for elementary statistics for a summer course

One view of the conceptual scheme of the course has three main vertices:

![](reference/figures/triangle.png)

Most students start at the lower left vertex and need to move along the
bottom edge to work with high-dimensional data generated by sequencing
technologies.

Ultimately we want to use data to climb up the edges to expand
biological medical knowledge. We’ll conduct an introductory exploration
of four topic areas in statistics and data science:

-   Probability and simulation
-   Exploratory data analysis and visualization
-   Hypothesis testing
-   Linear models
-   Ontology as a branch of information science
-   Brief introduction to convolutional neural nets

TBD: MultiAssayExperiment applications with SingleCellMultimodal (for
convenience)

[CITEseq](https://bioconductor.org/packages/release/data/experiment/vignettes/SingleCellMultiModal/inst/doc/CITEseq.html)

[TENx
MultiOme](https://bioconductor.org/packages/release/data/experiment/vignettes/SingleCellMultiModal/inst/doc/scMultiome.html)

[seqFISH](https://bioconductor.org/packages/release/data/experiment/vignettes/SingleCellMultiModal/inst/doc/seqFISH.html)

</div>

</div>

<div id="main" class="col-md-9" role="main">

# Package index

<div class="section level2">

## All functions

</div>

<div class="section level2">

-   `accex` : MultiAssayExperiment instance for ACC
-   `build_deck()` : make a deck of cards with 52 elements and unicode
    symbols for suits
-   `c50` : meaningless integers
-   `c5000` : read depth for 5000 positions on pasilla chr4, from
    example(coverage) for GenomicAlignments
-   `de_results` : topTable excerpt for SRP045638, see vGene
-   `doubsim` : simulated draws of top card from a shuffled deck of
    cards
-   `doubsim2` : simulated draws of top card from a shuffled deck of
    cards
-   `doubsim3` : simulated draws of top card from a shuffled deck of
    cards
-   `egr1_ex` : RNASeq2GeneNorm measures for EGR1 from TCGA ACC samples
-   `faces()` : get faces of a collection of cards
-   `fos_ex` : RNASeq2GeneNorm measures for FOS from TCGA ACC samples
-   `full_house()` : test for full house
-   `gtex_exc_chr20_b38` : data.frame with GTEx lung eQTL data and
    metadata, a selection from chr20
-   `is_flush()` : test for flush
-   `mod` : model matrix for SRP045638, see vGene
-   `nonlindat` : a data frame with y and x in a sigmoidal relationship
    (with error and a covariate z)
-   `one_pair()` : test for one pair
-   `queryCHCA()` : use a snapshot of CuratedQueryAtlasR through duckdb
-   `suits()` : get suits of a collection of cards
-   `two_pairs()` : test for two pairs
-   `vGene` : vGene result for a recount dataset, SRP045638
-   `yy1_ex` : RNASeq2GeneNorm measures for YY1 from TCGA ACC samples

</div>

</div>

<div id="main" class="col-md-9" role="main">

# Articles

<div class="section">

### All vignettes

<div class="section-desc">

</div>

-   [S1\_probability: Definitions and exercises](S1_probability.md):
-   [S1a: A look at the hypergeometric distribution](S1b_hyper.md):
-   [S2\_EDA: Exploratory data analysis and visualization](S2_EDA.md):
-   [S2a: Elements of PCA](S2a_PCAelem.md):
-   [S3: Distances, clustering](S3_distclust.md):
-   [S4\_inference: Definitions and
    exercises](S4_hypothesis_testing.md):
-   [S5\_inference: FDR, linear models, and GLMs](S5_linear_models.md):
-   [S5a: Diagnostics of a differential gene expression
    exercise](S5a_lmdiagnostics.md):
-   [S5b: hypothesis testing in nonlinear regression](S5b_nonlin.md):
-   [S6 HCA, ontologies, shiny](S6_hca_onto.md):
-   [S7 Neural net concepts and applications](S7_cnn.md):
